title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates OpenClaw as a business automation platform deployed on commodity hardware running AI agents to manage websites, learn brand guidelines, and orchestrate sub-agents in content pipelines. The video compares multi-agent orchestration using OpenClaw with single-agent workflows using Claude Code.
